case_title: MARTINEZ, ALFRED AS GUARDIAN FOR STEFAN MARTINEZ et al VS CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO S.F.MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, ALFRED AS GUARDIAN FOR STEFAN MARTINEZ MARTINEZ, STEFAN                   MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO S.F.MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTE: NO DENIAL LETTER,BUT PLTFF FILED A DECL.THAT THE C&C OF S.F. HAS NOT RESPONDED ON HIS CLAIM IN THE PAST 45 DAYS.
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
AD LITEM SIGNED BY COMM. PAULINE SLOAN.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO S.F.MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ALFRED AS GUARDIAN FOR STEFAN MARTINEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO S.F.MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $270.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: PETITION OF MINOR PLTF FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED IN COURT.-GRANTED.
